name: Subcontracting Order Report
query:
SELECT
    so.customer_document AS "Customer Document",
    soo.name as "SO No:Link/Sales Order:150",
    soo.customer as "Customer:Link/Customer",
    soo.customer_name as "Customer Name",
    so.name AS "Subcontracting Order:Link/Subcontracting Order:150", 
    so.purchase_order AS "Subcontracting Purchase Order:Link/Purchase Order:120",
    so.transaction_date AS "Date:Date:140",
    soi.schedule_date AS "Required By:Date:140",
    so.status AS "Order Status:120", 
    so.supplier AS "Supplier:Link/Supplier:120", 
    so.supplier_name AS "Supplier Name:120",
    soi.item_code AS "Item Code:Link/Item:120", 
    soi.description AS "Description::150", 
    so.set_warehouse AS "Target Warehouse", 
    si.qty as "SO Qty",
    soi.qty AS "SCO Qty:120", 
    sos.supplied_qty AS "MT Qty", 
    soi.received_qty AS "Received Qty:120",
    sos.returned_qty AS "Returned Qty:120",
    (soi.qty - soi.received_qty - sos.returned_qty) AS "Pending Qty:120",
    POP.qty - POP.received_qty AS "PO Pending Qty",
    CASE 
        WHEN soi.qty = (soi.received_qty + soi.returned_qty) THEN 'Completed' 
        WHEN soi.qty > (soi.received_qty + soi.returned_qty) THEN 'Pending' 
        ELSE 'In Progress' 
    END AS "Status",
    DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, soi.schedule_date) AS "Delay(In Days)",
    so.company AS "Company:150"
    
    
FROM 
    `tabSubcontracting Order` so
INNER JOIN 
    `tabSubcontracting Order Item` soi ON soi.parent = so.name
INNER JOIN 
    `tabSubcontracting Order Supplied Item` sos ON sos.parent = so.name and sos.main_item_code = soi.item_code
INNER JOIN(select 
    po.name as "name",
    poi.fg_item as "fg_item",
    poi.item_code as "item_code",
    poi.qty as "qty",
    poi.received_qty as "received_qty"
    from
    `tabPurchase Order` po  
inner join
    `tabPurchase Order Item` poi ON poi.parent = po.name)POP on POP.name = so.purchase_order and POP.fg_item = sos.main_item_code
left join 
`tabSales Order` soo on soo.customer_document = so.customer_document
left join 
`tabSales Order Item` si on si.parent = soo.name and si.item_code = soi.item_code
WHERE 
    so.docstatus = 1 
    AND DATE(so.transaction_date) BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s 
    AND so.company = %(company)s 
Group by 
so.name,soi.item_code
